The following discussion of skilled nursing services applies the foregoing principles to 
specific skilled nursing services about which questions are most frequently raised. 

40.1.2.1 - Observation and Assessment of the Patient's Condition When 
Only the Specialized Skills of a Medical Professional Can Determine 
Patient's Status
